title: Oreodaphne psychotrioides
taxonomy: Oreodaphne psychotrioides is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae. It is native to China and is classified as an evergreen shrub or small tree. The plant is part of the genus Oreodaphne, which is a group of flowering plants that are commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Oreodaphne psychotrioides is closely related to other members of the Lauraceae family, which include laurel and avocado trees. The plant's classification is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics.
